entries.name: An unauthorized human mage crossed the Thalassian wards
Can Jaina’s head-start source plan still blunt Stratholme before the city fully turns?

Can the Andorhal cell be breached through a live capture before the district reacts?
Can the Hearthglen road and Arthas become the outside force the field team now needs?
Can the anti-blade sequence be delivered before Arthas hardens the kingdom completely around himself?
Can the partial ritual data become a usable answer before more sites are lost?
Can the seam in Frostmourne’s field be turned into a usable weakness?

Do the Barov roads and estate stores lead to a live command-tier answer?
Does the real answer now lie north in Northrend, where Arthas is already sailing?
How did the contamination get into living bodies?
How far can the network reach to silence compromised witnesses from a distance?
How large is the grain distribution network, and who is running it?
If grain is only the shell, what distant broadcaster or relay is actually turning contaminated bodies on?
Something is wrong in the leylines and the ward-stones can feel it
The dead from Millhaven marched north toward Quel'Thalas
What are the political consequences of detaining Antonidas's apprentice at the border?
What does Arthas’s clean-hands image mean for the chapters after Stratholme?
What happened to Jaina after she crossed to Caer Darrow?
What happened to Millhaven?
What larger war is the plague preparing for?
What must be done about a damaged but still-active Frostmourne after Arthas’s death?
Where north of Andorhal is Kel'Thuzad actually operating?
Who is the newer grain seller on the road, and does he matter?
Why did Jaina Proudmoore cross into Quel'Thalas alone?
Will Lordaeron command act on the plague warning before visible disaster forces it?
Will Uther’s warning about Arthas matter before the prince burns too hot to stop?
Will institutional recall pull the investigation apart before the northward pursuit can begin?
Will the throne-room survivors be believed, or will the aftermath harden into custody and tribunal instead?
